v1_original.description: Original prompt with null pet_id (deprecated — null bias)
v1_original.text:
Analyze this photo of a pet camera feed. Respond with valid JSON only, no markdown.
{"is_valid": true if a cat is clearly visible else false,
 "caption": "one sentence describing the cat's appearance and action",
 "pet_id": "mike" if calico/tricolor cat or "chatora" if tabby/orange cat or null,
 "behavior": one of "eating","sleeping","playing","resting","moving","grooming","other"}

v2_no_petid.description: Production prompt v2 — pet_id removed from VLM (use bbox color instead)
v2_no_petid.text:
Analyze this photo of a pet camera feed. Respond with valid JSON only, no markdown.
{"is_valid": true if a cat is clearly visible else false,
 "caption": "one sentence describing the cat's appearance and action",
 "behavior": one of "eating","sleeping","playing","resting","moving","grooming","other"}

v1_other.description: Prompt with 'other' string instead of null for pet_id
v1_other.text:
Analyze this photo of a pet camera feed. Respond with valid JSON only, no markdown.
{"is_valid": true if a cat is clearly visible else false,
 "caption": "one sentence describing the cat's appearance and action",
 "pet_id": "mike" if calico/tricolor cat, "chatora" if tabby/orange cat, "other" if different cat or not a cat,
 "behavior": one of "eating","sleeping","playing","resting","moving","grooming","other"}
